content:
🔥 summarize | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To quickly extract the essential information from web pages, documents, and media content through an accessible CLI and browser extension.
✨ Key Features: • Chrome Side Panel chat with streaming agent and history • Video slide extraction with OCR and transcript cards for YouTube and video files • Media-aware summarization (auto-detects audio/video vs. page content) • Support for multiple coding CLI backends (Codex, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
📖 Summary: Summarize is a versatile tool that provides concise summaries from various sources including URLs, files, and media like YouTube videos. It offers both a command-line interface (CLI) and a Chrome Side Panel extension for convenient access.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
